message:
test(bd-3qqy): cover remaining message fixture branches

Add 10 new tests for testing/fixtures/messages.rs covering:
valid_initialized_notification, resources/prompts requests, ping/pong,
initialize response structure, list/call responses, error response
variants, remaining invalid message variants, notification without
params, log/cancelled notifications, and error response with data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
